name: Iniciativa Mestni zbor
description: Activist initiative originated in Maribor as one of the results of Slovenian uprisings in 2013. They organise local community assemblies (informal meetings of the people living in same parts of municipality) in Municipality of Maribor and provide assistance with moderation of assemblies, in order to encourage people to actively debate about, cooperate and co-create in local environments in which they live and work.. type: directdemocracy. curated by: yes

description: KNOF is is a social entrepreneur community which believes in (social) entrepreneurship with environmental, social or healthy impact, local self-sufficiency and inclusion of people with fever opportunities. description: Institute for counselling, promotion and development of accessible tourism Premiki was established by ŠENT- Slovenian Asociation for Mental Health as a social enterprise in 2010.
